meta.title: Log In — AlgoSu
meta.description: Log in to AlgoSu and start your algorithm study journey.

login.title: Welcome to
login.subtitle: Sign in easily with your social account.

demo.description: Explore all features without signing in (read-only)

guest.prompt: Want a quick look before signing up?

terms.prefix: By signing in, you agree to our

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.githubConnect: Connect your GitHub account to join AlgoSu.

github.title: Connect GitHub
github.description: Link your GitHub account to enable automatic code uploads.
github.benefit1: Submissions are automatically pushed to your GitHub repository.
github.benefit2: Share code with study members and receive AI analysis results.
github.benefit3: You can set up GitHub integration anytime from your profile.

expired.title: Session Expired
expired.description: You were automatically signed out for security. Please sign in again.

errors.oauthFailed: Could not verify sign-in. Please try again.
errors.serviceFailed: The sign-in service encountered a temporary error. Please try again later.
errors.demoFailed: Demo sign-in failed. Please try again later.
errors.githubLinkFailed: GitHub connection failed. Please try again later.
errors.invalidState: Invalid authentication state. Please try again.
errors.missingCode: Authentication code is missing. Please try again.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
